query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blog_post_views (
  id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  blogPostId VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  viewCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastViewedAt DATETIME NULL,
  createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (blogPostId) REFERENCES blog_posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blog_post_views (
  id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  blogPostId VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  viewCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastViewedAt DATETIME NULL,
  createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (blogPostId) REFERENCES blog_posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
